content_fingerprint: llama cpp ships ssm scan support for webgpu backend in release b8926 the llama cpp project released version b8926 on april 25 2026 adding state space model scan support to its webgpu backend alongside broader platform and cuda compatibility updates the llama cpp project maintained under ggml org has published release b8926 introducing support for the ssm scan operation within its webgpu backend this addition tracked as pr 22327 also disables error checking for the set rows function in that context and includes binding fixes and updated operator support to improve compatibility the release furt
